info.name: Rimoto Backend API
info.description:
Complete API testing collection for the Rimoto Community Backend.

**Stack:** Express.js + TypeScript · MySQL · Prisma ORM · JWT Auth (httpOnly cookies)

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:4000`

## Authentication
- **Users:** Google OAuth 2.0 (browser-based, cannot be tested via Postman directly)
- **Admin:** Email + Password → sets `access_token` httpOnly cookie automatically

## Testing Flow
1. Start with **Admin Login** to get a session cookie
2. Test Public endpoints (no auth required)
3. Test Admin endpoints (cookie auto-sent after login)

## Variables
- `base_url` — API base (default: `http://localhost:4000`)
- `ride_id` — placeholder ride UUID for testing
- `story_id` — placeholder story UUID for testing

item.name: 🏥 Health

request.description: Basic health check — returns `{ status: 'ok', message: 'Rimoto API is running 🚀' }`
Detailed health endpoint — returns `{ success, message, uptime, env }`

item.description: Health check endpoints to verify the server is running.

item.name: 🔐 Auth

exec: // The access_token cookie is set automatically as httpOnly
// Postman will send it on subsequent requests to the same domain

request.description:
Authenticate as the hardcoded admin user.

**Body:** `{ email, password }`

**Response:** `{ ok: true }` + sets `access_token` httpOnly cookie (1 day expiry)

**Note:** Use the credentials from your `.env` file (`ADMIN_EMAIL` and `ADMIN_PASSWORD`).
Should return 400 — password is missing.
Should return 401 — invalid credentials.

Returns the currently authenticated user profile from the JWT cookie.

**Requires:** Valid `access_token` cookie (login first).

**Response:** `{ id, role, email }`

Clears the `access_token` cookie, ending the session.

**Response:** `{ ok: true }`

⚠️ **Browser-only** — This redirects to Google's OAuth consent screen.

Open this URL in a browser instead of Postman to test the full OAuth flow.

The callback at `/api/v1/auth/google/callback` will set the `access_token` cookie and redirect to the frontend.

Refreshes the access token using the HttpOnly `refresh_token` cookie.

**Response:** `{ ok: true }` + sets new `access_token` and `refresh_token` cookies.

item.description:
Authentication endpoints.

- Admin login via email/password
- User login via Google OAuth (browser-only)
- Get current user profile
- Logout

item.name: 🏍️ Public — Rides

exec: // Auto-capture first ride ID for later tests

request.description: Paginate rides — 5 per page.

item.name: Get Rides — Filter by Skill Level

request.description:
Filter rides by skill level.

**Valid values:** `BEGINNER`, `INTERMEDIATE`, `ADVANCED`

Filter rides by timeframe.

**Valid values:**
- `this_week` — next 7 days
- `this_month` — until end of current month
- `upcoming` — all future dates

query.description: Searches title, startLocation, endLocation, and organizer name

request.description: Full-text-like search across ride title, start/end locations, and organizer name.
Combine all filters: skill level + timeframe + search + pagination.

Returns rides with a non-null `featuredSlot` (up to 3).

**Featured slots:** `HERO_BANNER`, `WEEKEND_PICK`, `EDITORS_CHOICE`

Increment the `whatsappJoinsCount` for a ride and return its WhatsApp group URL.

**Response:** `{ whatsappGroupUrl: string }`

**Note:** Replace `{{ride_id}}` with a real ride UUID, or run "Get All Rides" first (it auto-captures the first ride ID).
Should return 404 — ride doesn't exist.

item.description:
Public ride endpoints — no authentication required.

All rides returned have `status: APPROVED`.

item.name: 📖 Public — Stories

item.name: Get Stories — Sort by Top Votes

request.description: Sort stories by highest vote count (pinned stories still come first).

query.description: Options: RIDE_REVIEW, ROUTE_GUIDE, GEAR_TIPS, SOLO_STORY, ADVANCED

request.description:
Filter stories by flair type.

**Valid values:** `RIDE_REVIEW`, `ROUTE_GUIDE`, `GEAR_TIPS`, `SOLO_STORY`, `ADVANCED`

query.description: Searches title, destinationTag, and author name

request.description: Search stories by title, destination tag, or author name.
Combine all story filters: sort + flair + search + pagination.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "My Epic Journey",
    "destinationTag": "Himalayas",
    "flairType": "SOLO_STORY",
    "contentBody": "The ride was absolutely breathtaking...",
    "images": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg", "https://example.com/image2.jpg"]
}

request.description:
Create a new story.

**Requires:** Valid `access_token` cookie (User must be logged in).

**Response:** Returns the newly created `Story` object with `status: PENDING`.

Upvote a story. Increments `voteCount` by 1.

**Response:** `{ voteCount: number }`

Downvote a story. Decrements `voteCount` by 1.

**Response:** `{ voteCount: number }`
Should return 400 — direction must be "up" or "down".

item.description:
Public story endpoints — no authentication required.

All stories returned have `status: APPROVED`. Pinned stories always appear first.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Dashboard

request.description:
Returns admin dashboard KPI metrics and recent activity log.

**Requires:** Admin cookie (run Admin Login first).

**Response shape:**
```json
{
  "pendingRides": number,
  "publishedRides": number,
  "totalRiders": number,
  "pendingStories": number,
  "recentActivity": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "actionType": "Approved",
      "actionSeverity": "SUCCESS | WARNING | DANGER",
      "message": "string",
      "createdAt": "ISO string",
      "actor": { "firstName", "lastName", "avatarUrl" }
    }
  ]
}
```

item.description:
Admin dashboard endpoints.

**⚠️ All requests require a valid admin session cookie.** Run "Admin Login" first.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Ride Submissions

request.description: Get all pending ride submissions for admin review.
Get all approved ride submissions.
Get all rejected ride submissions.

Approve a pending ride submission. Automatically logs the action in `admin_logs`.

**Body:** `{ action: "APPROVE" }`

Approve a ride and assign it to a featured slot.

**Body:** `{ action: "APPROVE", featuredSlot: "HERO_BANNER" | "WEEKEND_PICK" | "EDITORS_CHOICE" }`

Reject a pending ride submission. Automatically logs the action.

**Body:** `{ action: "REJECT" }`
Should return 400 — action must be "APPROVE" or "REJECT".

item.name: 🛡️ Admin — Featured Content

request.description:
Atomically update all 3 featured ride slots.

**Must provide exactly 3 slots.** Clears all existing featured assignments first, then sets the new ones in a single transaction.

**Valid slots:** `HERO_BANNER`, `WEEKEND_PICK`, `EDITORS_CHOICE`

**Body:**
```json
{
  "slots": [
    { "rideId": "uuid", "slot": "HERO_BANNER" },
    { "rideId": "uuid", "slot": "WEEKEND_PICK" },
    { "rideId": "uuid", "slot": "EDITORS_CHOICE" }
  ]
}
```

**⚠️ Replace the ride UUIDs with actual ride IDs from your database.**
Should return 400 — exactly 3 slots are required.

item.name: Update Featured Slots — Invalid Slot Name

request.description: Should return 400 — invalid slot name.

item.description:
Admin featured content management.

**⚠️ All requests require a valid admin session cookie.** Run "Admin Login" first.

item.name: 🚫 Error Cases

request.description:
Access an admin endpoint without logging in.

**Expected:** 401 — No token provided.

**Tip:** Clear cookies before running this test.

Hit a route that doesn't exist.

**Expected:** 404 from the `notFound` middleware.

item.description: Negative test cases for error handling and edge cases.
